com.delphix.masking.api.plugin.typeAdapters

Class TypeAdaptingComponentWrapper<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.delphix.masking.api.plugin.typeAdapters.TypeAdaptingComponentWrapper<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    JsonConfigurable, MaskingAlgorithm<T>, MaskingComponent, PluginComponent

    public class TypeAdaptingComponentWrapper<T>
extends java.lang.Object
implements MaskingAlgorithm<T>

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Description copied from interface: PluginComponent
        Get the recommended name of this Component. This name must be unique across all components delivered in a single plugin.
        Specified by:
        getName in interface PluginComponent
        Returns:
        The name of this component

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()

        Specified by:
        getDescription in interface PluginComponent
        Returns:
        The text description

      • setChildAlgorithm

        public void setChildAlgorithm(MaskingAlgorithm<T> childAlgorithm)

      • setup

        public void setup(@Nonnull
                  ComponentService componentService)
        Description copied from interface: MaskingComponent
        Prepare this object for use. This includes acquiring any required external resources, such as files or other components, using the passed serviceProvider. The component object's JSON configuration is always injected before this method is called.
        While the serviceProvider object is guaranteed to remain valid fof the life of this component, some methods accessed through the serviceProvider may only be invoked during setup. Please consult the documentation for the ComponentService provider interface for details.
        Specified by:
        setup in interface MaskingComponent
        Parameters:
        componentService - The service provider object

      • mask

        public T mask(T value)
       throws MaskingException
        Description copied from interface: MaskingAlgorithm

        Method to mask a value of the specified type. All algorithms must provide an implementation of this method, even if the maskBatch method below is implemented.

        Attention! This method accesses the value to be masked. This sensitive information should never be logged!

        Specified by:
        mask in interface MaskingAlgorithm<T>
        Parameters:
        value - The value to be masked.
        Returns:
        The masked value. In case of a GenericDataRow type, the returned value will be ignored. In that case the corresponding GenericData object should be modified.
        Throws:
        MaskingException - If an error occurs while masking.

      • getAllowFurtherInstances

        public boolean getAllowFurtherInstances()
        Description copied from interface: MaskingComponent
        Returns true if additional instances of this component may be created beyond those enumerated by MaskingComponent.getDefaultInstances(). Components for which this method returns true and that implement a MaskingAlgorithm interface are treated as Algorithm Frameworks by the masking engine.
        Specified by:
        getAllowFurtherInstances in interface MaskingComponent
        Returns:
        The boolean value indicating whether additional instances may be created

      • getDefaultInstances

        public java.util.Collection<MaskingComponent> getDefaultInstances()
        Description copied from interface: MaskingComponent
        Return a collection of objects that describe the default set of instances that should be created for this component at plugin installation time. Additional instances may be created later as long as MaskingComponent.getAllowFurtherInstances() returns true.
        Specified by:
        getDefaultInstances in interface MaskingComponent
        Returns:
        A collection of objects that are the instances of this component to be created.

      • listMultiColumnFields

        public java.util.List<AlgorithmLogicalField> listMultiColumnFields()
        Description copied from interface: MaskingAlgorithm

        This method is required for multi-column algorithm. It allows the multi-column algorithm to describe the fields it expects to process. An algorithm is considered multi-column when its parameterized type is GenericDataRow. Each field in the return list must have a unique value for name, and at least one masked field (not read-only) must be defined that is not marked optional.

        In the MaskingAlgorithm.mask(T) method, these values will be provided in a GenericData object as part of GenericDataRow object. The GenericData object is for each of the field defined by this method. The actual data can be retrieved by calling the appropriate get method on that object. An algorithm that implements optional fields must be prepared to handle the case where the GenericDataRow get method returns null when an optional field is requested.

        A default implementation is provided to support older multi-column algorithms that implement one or both of MaskingAlgorithm.listMaskedFields() and MaskingAlgorithm.listReadOnlyFields().
        Specified by:
        listMultiColumnFields in interface MaskingAlgorithm<T>
        Returns:
        A list of AlgorithmLogicalField objects describing each input field. The value for type can't be MaskingAlgorithm.MaskingType.GENERIC_DATA_ROW.
